_comment: Per-agent model choice — the one place to tune each agent. Standard is opus for every agent. To change one, edit its value below and run .claude/scripts/apply-agent-models.sh (or just ask: /setmodels). Valid models: opus | sonnet | haiku | inherit.
_pm_note: pm-agent is LOCKED to opus and cannot be changed. Any other value here is ignored and forced back to opus.
_speed_tip: opus = deepest reasoning (slowest). sonnet = balanced. haiku = fastest + cheapest. To speed the team up, drop individual non-PM agents toward sonnet/haiku.
